title: [長期置頂]WE HAVE TO BE CAREFUL

replies.msg:
[First of all,I’m sorry for my bad English,I just want to remind you guys]
Opening this new channel may cause serious problems. If the 50 cent party ruin this channel, our international support will be affected. Here’s some corresponding methods that we can do:

1. PLEASE DON'T post dumb/irrelevant post. This channel should be our way to share information and messages to foreign countries so that they can understand what we’re doing and what activities do we have. If there is a lot of irrelevant posts, posts that matters may not be seen by others. So PLEASE, be careful with your post, remember our purpose.

2. Always REMEMBER this channel. You can post English translation of the main channel posts to tell foreigners what is happening in Hong Kong, it would be useful. Also, you can post about some perspective on the police brutality or something else that relate to the Hong Kong protest.

That’s all I wanna say. Hope you guy can always remember what I’ve said. At last, one little favor, can you guys help me push this post? I’m a P牌仔
